While drivers will not lose their licenses for lacking language skills, strict action will be taken against illegal operations.

articles.title: Maruti Suzuki lines up record capex of Rs 14k cr to add capacity

The company is adding new production lines in Haryana and Gujarat. This expansion is crucial as existing facilities operate at full capacity with a significant backlog of orders.

articles.title: Mini Convertible goes sporty with JCW Pack at Rs 61.5 lakh: Details
articles.description: The Mini Convertible JCW Pack features a black soft top, that can be fully opened in 18 seconds at speeds of up to 30 km/h, with the window bars and side windows lowering simultaneously. The soft top closes in 15 seconds and it can also be partially opened up to 40 cm, functioning like a sunroof, regardless of speed. Boot space stands at 160 litres with the roof down and increases to 215 litres when the top is closed.

articles.title: App Store annual subscriptions get new discounted monthly option
articles.description: If that one big sum per year for an annual app subscription is too much to pay at once, the App Store will let you break that into monthly payments. Apple is making it easier to get annual subscription discounts Subscription revenue has become an integral part of Apple Services . Developers have a few ways to draw customers into long-term usage and bigger payouts, but they require big up-front financial commitments. Apple has revealed a new payment option that could help developers offer better discounts while still getting a long-term commitment from the user. It works by offering the user an annual discount that is paid for over 12 months. Continue Reading on AppleInsider | Discuss on our Forums

articles.title: MagSafe Monday: Scosche’s 2-in-1 Qi2 mount is the perfect car companion for summer travel
articles.description: When you are looking for a MagSafe car mount, you usually have to make a hard choice right at the start of your shopping decisions. Do you want a vent mount or a dashboard mount? Vent mounts are great because they are easy to move between cars and avoid the need for adhesives on your car’s dash, but they can sometimes block your airflow. Dashboard mounts offer a more permanent feel but can be harder to get right. Scosche decided to skip that debate entirely with the Scosche MagicMount Charge Pro, which includes both options in the box. I prefer the vent mount because I love helping keep my iPhone cool on summer trips, where it can overheat by letting my AC keep it cool while it’s keeping my car cold. more...
